commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Behold, at that time I will deal with all that afflict you: and I will save her that is lame, and gather those that were driven out; and I will get them praise and fame in every land where they have been put to shame. Septuagint, "do in thee, for thy sake at "(Haydock) Halteth, and have no children, (Micheas iv. ) denoting the Gentiles. (Calmet) Septuagint, "squeezed out "like grapes, being in distress. Jerome) Where. Septuagint, "and they shall be ashamed at".
